_comment: cinematic_fullscreen (display): prominence=hero, sizing=fullscreen, chrome=none, autoplay=muted. story_then_play (delivery): narration_position=before_content (already default), pause_after_narration_seconds=1, audio_ducking_db=-6 (already default). chrome=none drops the chrome layer, so layers = [content] only. This expected payload is what the cascade order MUST produce; if it ever drifts, the engine's merge order is broken.
